g.text: all four nulls hold after S0-S7

text.style: font-size: 7.4px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; fill: #666666

g.text: Single-branch nulls route to O.12/O.23 interpretation;

text.style: font-size: 7.4px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; fill: #666666

g.text: the hard surrogate-level null is joint.

g.text: Protocol A-Prime T2(nu_d): branch peaks, control sign, and F1 joint null

g.text: Source: Ch13 Protocol A-Prime; synthetic design curve for registered Branch A/B windows, 150 MHz control, and chirality contrast.
